title: Lookup
description: GET /lookup?path=<abs> — durable identity for a path without OpenLoupe opening JuiceMount's SQLite. JM-4 (new endpoint).

path.description: Echo of the queried absolute path.

inode.description: entries.inode — stable across remount/rename (omitted when exists=false).

nas_rel_path.description: DEFINED BY THIS CONTRACT as path minus mount_point (no such column exists today — JuiceMount computes it). Human-debuggable secondary identity.
